items.wooden_chest_desc: A simple wooden chest containing common treasures
items.iron_chest_desc: A sturdy iron chest with better treasures inside
items.golden_chest_desc: A magnificent golden chest filled with rare treasures
items.lucky_key_desc: A magical key that increases your luck for the next collection
items.experience_potion_desc: A potion that grants 100 experience points

settings.title: Settings
settings.pushNotificationsDesc: Receive treasure spawn and collection alerts
settings.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive weekly summaries and important updates
settings.rareItemAlertsDesc: Alert when epic or legendary items appear nearby
settings.showAllItemsDesc: Show items of all rarities on the map
settings.autoCollectDesc: Automatically collect items when nearby (requires location)
settings.publicProfileDesc: Allow others to view your collection and achievements
settings.showOnLeaderboardDesc: Display your username on the leaderboard
settings.shareLocationDesc: Share your approximate location for nearby treasure discovery
settings.darkModeDesc: Use dark theme to reduce eye strain
settings.saveFailed: Failed to save settings, please try again
settings.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all local settings? This cannot be undone.

common.普通石子: An ordinary stone, humble but part of any collection.
common.小树枝: A small twig fallen from a tree, simple and unadorned.
common.落花: Petals drifting in the wind, carrying a faint fragrance.
common.幸运草: An ordinary clover, but with a hint of luck.
common.鹅卵石: Smooth pebbles, polished by years of water flow.
common.松果: A pinecone fallen from a pine tree, a gift from nature.
common.贝壳: A gift from the sea, carrying the scent of the ocean.
common.羽毛: A feather lost by a bird, light and elegant.
common.小蘑菇: A small mushroom in the forest, cute but not edible.
common.枫叶: Maple leaves falling in autumn, a blaze of red.
common.雪花结晶: A beautiful moment captured before snow melts.
common.漂流瓶: A drift bottle from afar, seems to contain a note inside.
common.萤火虫: A tiny sprite on summer nights, emitting a faint glow.
common.蒲公英种子: Dandelion seeds floating in the wind, make a wish!

rare.水晶碎片: Glowing crystal shards, containing mysterious energy.
rare.月光石: A stone that glows pale blue under moonlight.
rare.四叶草: A legendary symbol of luck, bringing good fortune.
rare.琥珀: Solidified time, preserving ancient life within.
rare.猫眼石: A gem like a cat's eye, mysterious and elusive.
rare.蓝宝石碎片: Precious sapphire shards, sparkling with deep sea light.
rare.翡翠玉佩: An ancient jade pendant, radiating warm luster.
rare.彩虹碎片: Part of a rainbow, dazzling with seven colors.
rare.星尘: Stardust fallen from the sky, sparkling with cosmic light.
rare.极光之羽: Feathers colored by the aurora, mysterious and beautiful.
rare.珊瑚枝: Branches of sea coral, colorful and vibrant.
rare.珍珠: Treasure born of the sea, white and round.
rare.紫水晶: Mysterious purple crystal, radiating noble aura.
rare.龙鳞片: Scales from a legendary dragon, hard as iron.
rare.凤凰羽: Feathers shed by the phoenix, carrying undying flame.

epic.时光沙漏: A mysterious item said to control the flow of time.
epic.星辰之心: The core of a fallen star, containing infinite energy.
epic.龙之泪: The tears of a dragon, crystallized into gems.
epic.永恒之火: An eternal flame, warm and mysterious.
epic.月光宝盒: A mysterious box that can traverse space and time.
epic.精灵之泪: Precious tears of elves, possessing healing power.
epic.彩虹桥碎片: A fragment of the rainbow bridge connecting heaven and earth.
epic.独角兽之角: The horn left by a legendary unicorn, pure and flawless.
epic.魔法水晶球: A mysterious crystal ball that can foresee the future.
epic.天使之翼: Wings shed by an angel, pure and sacred.
epic.海神之泪: The tears of Poseidon, containing the power of the ocean.
epic.仙女尘: Magical dust scattered by fairies, can grant small wishes.

legendary.黄金罗盘: A divine artifact that always points the way, you will never be lost.
legendary.凤凰之心: The heart left after the phoenix's rebirth, immortal.
legendary.创世之石: The first stone of creation, containing the power of creation.
legendary.龙之宝藏: Treasure guarded by a dragon for millennia, invaluable.
legendary.时间水晶: A crystal that can manipulate time, extremely precious.
legendary.永恒之星: A star that never falls, illuminating the darkness.
legendary.神龙之珠: The legendary dragon pearl, possessing magical powers.
legendary.天使之泪: The tears of an angel, can purify everything.
legendary.命运轮盘: A mysterious wheel that can change fate.
legendary.创世神之眼: The eye left by the Creator, can see through everything.
